item.title: 🇮🇷⚔️🚢 Iran Fires on Three Ships in Strait of Hormuz as Diplomacy Stalls
item.description: Iran attacked three vessels in the strategic waterway, seizing two of them. The escalation comes as US blockade continues and diplomatic efforts to end the conflict face mounting challenges.

item.title: 🏛️🇺🇸 Rep. David Scott, Georgia Democrat, Dies at Age 80
item.description: The 13-term congressman from Georgia died while seeking re-election. Scott served on the House Financial Services Committee and was known for bipartisan efforts.

item.title: 🇸🇰🇷🇺🛢️ Slovakia Resumes Russian Oil Flow Through Ukraine Pipeline
item.description: Russian oil deliveries to Slovakia have resumed through the Druzhba pipeline after Ukraine unblocked the route, resolving a months-long standoff over transit fees.

item.title: ⛪🌍 Pope Leo Criticises Equatorial Guinea Prisons at End of Africa Tour
item.description: During his visit, Pope Leo delivered a frank critique of prison conditions in Equatorial Guinea, calling for reforms as he concluded his Africa tour.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇰🇷💰 India and South Korea Agree to Double Trade to $50 Billion by 2030
item.description: The two nations signed agreements to expand cooperation in shipbuilding, defense, and AI technology, strengthening economic ties amid regional tensions.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanon seeks ceasefire extension as Israel destroys homes in occupied border areas
item.description: Lebanon is asking for a one-month extension of the ceasefire with Israel during Washington talks, while Israel continues demolishing homes in southern Lebanese territory it has occupied since the truce.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Tencent releases first flagship AI model led by former OpenAI researcher
item.description: Chinese tech giant Tencent unveiled its HY3 AI model, described as its most powerful yet, developed under former OpenAI researcher Yao Shunyu. The model is open-source with 295 billion parameters.

item.title: 🇫🇷 G7 drops climate change from Paris agenda to avoid US confrontation
item.description: France confirmed climate change has been removed from the G7 environment ministers meeting agenda in Paris to prevent conflict with the United States, focusing instead on less contentious issues.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU unblocks €90bn Ukraine loan after Hungary pipeline repaired
item.description: Ukraine's Zelensky joins EU leaders in Cyprus as the bloc approves a massive loan package, ending a deadlock after Hungary lifted its veto following Kyiv's repair of a Russia-damaged pipeline.

item.title: 🇵🇪 Top ministers quit after Peru's president postpones F-16 fighter jet deal
item.description: Peru's defense and foreign ministers resigned after President Dina Boluarte postponed a $400 million F-16 purchase from the US, citing the need for more analysis.

item.title: ⚔️ US intercepts Iranian oil tankers in Asian waters
item.description: The US Navy seized multiple Iranian-flagged oil tankers in international waters, escalating enforcement of the blockade amid ongoing ceasefire negotiations.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israeli strike kills journalist in Lebanon, war crimes alleged
item.description: Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil was killed in an Israeli air strike. Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes, saying Red Cross vehicles were also attacked.

item.title: ⚓ US Navy Secretary John Phelan fired 'effective immediately'
item.description: The Pentagon announced Navy Secretary John Phelan is leaving his post immediately, the latest in a series of high-ranking defense leadership departures.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan ends ban on lethal weapons exports
item.description: Japan has scrapped its postwar ban on lethal weapons exports, marking a major shift in pacifist policy amid regional security concerns.

item.title: 🇨🇳 South China Sea islands mapped in new visual investigation
item.description: A new visual investigation maps China's militarization of disputed South China Sea islands, showing extensive fortifications and military infrastructure.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran attacks ships in Strait of Hormuz as US forces respond
item.description: Iranian forces attacked commercial vessels in the strategic Strait of Hormuz, prompting a US naval response amid ongoing ceasefire negotiations.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Germany unveils plan for Europe's strongest army as Russia threat grows
item.description: Germany announced ambitious plans to build Europe's most powerful military, citing Russia's preparation for large-scale conflict as the greatest threat to European security.

item.title: 🇪🇸 Spain to send ammunition and 100 armored vehicles to Ukraine
item.description: Spain pledged new military aid for Ukraine including 100 armored vehicles and ammunition, continuing European support amid stalled US-led peace efforts.

item.title: ⚠️ Chemical leak at West Virginia plant kills 2, sends 30 to hospitals
item.description: A chemical leak at a West Virginia industrial plant killed two people and hospitalized 30 others, prompting an investigation into safety protocols.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia could be ready for NATO conflict year after Ukraine, Dutch warn
item.description: Dutch intelligence warns Russia could be prepared for a NATO conflict within a year after ending the Ukraine war, urging European rearmament.

item.title: 🇲🇽 Deaths of CIA agents in Mexico spark sovereignty row with White House
item.description: US officials died during an operation in Chihuahua, Mexico, triggering diplomatic tensions as Mexico's government offered conflicting accounts of the CIA's role.

item.title: 🇮🇶 Iraq blocks US dollar shipment over Iran sanctions concerns
item.description: Iraq blocked a US dollar shipment amid concerns the funds could benefit Iran, highlighting the complex sanctions enforcement during the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan minister makes rare visit to disputed South China Sea island
item.description: Taiwan's Kuan Bi-ling observed coast guard drills on Taiping Island, claimed by China, the Philippines and Vietnam, in a rare high-level visit.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇵🇰 Turkiye making efforts to revive Russia-Ukraine talks
item.description: Turkish President Erdogan met with NATO chief as Kyiv asked Ankara to host a leaders' level meeting with Russia to restart stalled peace negotiations.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Virginia election called 'rigged' by Trump after redistricting vote
item.description: Trump claimed the Virginia redistricting referendum was rigged after voters approved new electoral maps by a slim margin of 51.4% to 48.5%.
